title: Metabolomics in the study of spontaneous animal diseases.
author: Tran H McConville M Loukopoulos P
content: S-EPMC7488963 PMC7488963 Metabolomics in the study of spontaneous animal diseases. Using analytical chemistry techniques such as nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy and liquid or gas chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC/GC-MS), metabolomics allows detection of most endogenous
